title: IEEE Rolls Out Large Language Models Training Course
abstract: Hey you! Are you ready? IEEE has just rolled out a Large Language Models training course—more than just a learning opportunity, it's a mind-blowing party! Join us to explore the tech that might make you laugh out loud. Don't let your curiosity wait; sign up now!
abstract_zh: Hey你！准备好了吗？IEEE这次可是放了个大招——推出了一门大型语言模型培训课程。这不仅仅是学习的机会，更像是一场思维的狂欢！快来和我们一起探索那些在聊天中可能让人笑掉大牙的技术吧！赶紧报名，别让你的好奇心等太久哦！
